title: Mimicked
description: A voice-mimicking client-side horror atmosphere mod.
body:
```
Something lurks in the dark; neither you nor I, but has a voice from us all.
```


This mod is a client-side only atmospheric horror mod. It adds randomly occurring instances of something that mimics a player's voice. The mod's goal is to enhance the experience of other mods. It is not recommended to use this mod alone.

While this mod is client-side only, it cannot function unless the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod is installed on both the client and the server. If you run into any issues with loading this mod, make sure the Simple Voice Chat mod is fully updated.
